candidate_definitions.text: HiFTNet: A Fast High-Quality Neural Vocoder with Harmonic-plus-Noise Filter and Inverse Short Time Fourier Transform

> Recent advancements in speech synthesis have leveraged GAN-based networks like HiFi-GAN and BigVGAN to produce high-fidelity waveforms from mel-spectrograms. However, these networks are computationally expensive and parameter-heavy. iSTFTNet addresses these limitations by inte…

Authors: [Da-Yi Wu](https://github.com/ericwudayi)\*, [Wen-Yi Hsiao](https://github.com/wayne391)\*, [Fu-Rong Yang](https://github.com/furongyang)\*, [Oscar Friedman](https://github.com/OscarFree), Warren Jackson, Scott Bruzenak, Yi-Wen Liu, [Yi-Hsuan Yang](https://github.com/af…
